metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Local On-Demand Delivery Marketplace domain. Each experience links directly to implementation-facing marketplace product bricks.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each product experience carries experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks used inside that experience.

rootGroups.name: Consumer Marketplace
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that help consumers discover, evaluate, order, track, and recover local commerce orders.

capabilities.name: Discover and Convert Local Demand
capabilities.description: Help consumers turn immediate food, grocery, convenience, and retail needs into confident orders.
outcomes: Higher order frequency per active consumer

flows.title: Find, evaluate, and place a local order
flows.description: From marketplace entry through basket economics and checkout completion.

dependencies.name: Local Commerce Home
dependencies.description: Personalized marketplace entry surface.
dependencies.how: Routes consumers into relevant verticals, offers, and reorder paths.

dependencies.name: Search, Browse & Ranking
dependencies.description: Search, category browse, ranking, filtering, and availability-aware results.
dependencies.how: Helps consumers find relevant stores and items.

dependencies.name: Reorder & Recommendation Engine
dependencies.description: Personalized reorder, replenishment, and discovery recommendations.
dependencies.how: Surfaces high-likelihood options and repeat-order shortcuts.

dependencies.name: Storefront, Menu & Item Detail
dependencies.description: Store, menu, item, modifier, photo, and availability surfaces.
dependencies.how: Gives consumers enough detail to build a confident basket.

dependencies.name: Ratings, Reviews & Quality Signals
dependencies.description: Trust and quality signals for stores and items.
dependencies.how: Adds evidence that the order is likely to meet expectations.

dependencies.name: Basket & Substitution Planner
dependencies.description: Basket, modifiers, substitutions, item availability, and order constraints.
dependencies.how: Turns selected items into a valid order candidate.

dependencies.name: Pricing, Fees & Promotion Engine
dependencies.description: Fees, discounts, minimums, offers, and basket economics.
dependencies.how: Explains total delivered cost and promotion eligibility.

dependencies.name: Membership & Subscription Benefits
dependencies.description: Membership savings, benefits, and eligibility.
dependencies.how: Applies subscription value where relevant.

dependencies.name: Checkout, Payments & Tipping
dependencies.description: Payment, tipping, delivery options, address, and order submission.
dependencies.how: Completes the transaction with clear cost and delivery promise.

capabilities.name: Deliver Reliably and Recover Fairly
capabilities.description: Coordinate merchant preparation, courier assignment, tracking, and issue resolution so orders arrive as promised and defects are handled fairly.

flows.title: Coordinate delivery and recover issues
flows.description: From canonical order state through merchant prep, dispatch, tracking, and support recovery.

dependencies.name: Order Management & State Machine
dependencies.description: Canonical order lifecycle and exception state.
dependencies.how: Anchors the order state used by consumer, merchant, courier, support, and finance workflows.

dependencies.name: Merchant Order Prep & POS Integration
dependencies.description: Merchant preparation state, POS sync, and readiness signals.
dependencies.how: Keeps dispatch aligned with merchant readiness.

dependencies.name: Dispatch, Matching & Assignment
dependencies.description: Courier assignment, offer, and work allocation.
dependencies.how: Matches orders with available courier supply.

dependencies.name: Routing, Geospatial & ETA
dependencies.description: Routing, geospatial, travel-time, and ETA services.
dependencies.how: Predicts pickup, delivery, and delay timing.

dependencies.name: Live Tracking & Notifications
dependencies.description: Consumer-facing order state, courier progress, and exception notifications.
dependencies.how: Explains order progress and delivery changes.

dependencies.name: Customer Care & Issue Resolution
dependencies.description: Self-service and assisted issue recovery.
dependencies.how: Resolves late, missing, wrong, damaged, or unsafe orders.

dependencies.name: Fraud, Abuse & Policy Controls
dependencies.description: Fraud, refund abuse, promotion abuse, and policy controls.
dependencies.how: Balances fair recovery with abuse prevention.

rootGroups.name: Merchant and Retailer Growth
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that help restaurants, grocery partners, and retailers launch, operate, advertise, and improve marketplace demand.

capabilities.name: Grow Merchant and Retail Supply
capabilities.description: Enable restaurants, grocery partners, and retailers to launch, operate, advertise, and improve profitable marketplace demand.
outcomes: Higher monthly orders per active store

flows.title: Launch, operate, and grow marketplace supply
flows.description: From partner onboarding through catalog, operations, promotions, ads, and performance insight.

dependencies.name: Merchant Onboarding & Compliance
dependencies.description: Partner identity, contract, compliance, store, tax, and banking setup.
dependencies.how: Gets restaurants, grocers, and retailers eligible to transact.

dependencies.name: Partner APIs & Webhooks
dependencies.description: Partner integration interfaces and webhook events.
dependencies.how: Connects POS, catalog, order, inventory, and reporting workflows.

dependencies.name: Catalog, Menu & Assortment Management
dependencies.description: Menus, item content, SKU mappings, prices, and availability.
dependencies.how: Makes supply searchable, purchasable, and operationally accurate.

dependencies.name: Merchant Order Prep & POS Integration
dependencies.description: Merchant order prep, POS integration, busy mode, and readiness signals.
dependencies.how: Supports live fulfillment and readiness control.

dependencies.name: Grocery and Retail Partner Operations
dependencies.description: Grocery and retail availability, substitutions, weighted items, and partner operations.
dependencies.how: Extends merchant operations into grocery and retail workflows.

dependencies.name: Merchant Promotions & CRM
dependencies.description: Merchant-funded offers, targeting, campaigns, and customer relationship tools.
dependencies.how: Lets partners stimulate incremental demand.

dependencies.name: Sponsored Listings & Retail Media
dependencies.description: Sponsored placement, retail media, campaign controls, and measurement.
dependencies.how: Monetizes and measures paid discovery.

dependencies.name: Merchant Analytics & Insights
dependencies.description: Merchant performance, profitability, ads, promotions, and operational reporting.
dependencies.how: Shows partners how marketplace actions affect outcomes.

rootGroups.name: Courier Logistics
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that attract, activate, retain, route, pay, and protect courier supply.

capabilities.name: Operate Courier Marketplace Supply
capabilities.description: Attract, activate, retain, and route courier supply so delivery coverage is reliable and courier earnings are understandable.

flows.title: Activate, route, and retain courier supply
flows.description: From courier work access through delivery assignment, earnings, and safety.

dependencies.name: Courier Onboarding & Work Access
dependencies.description: Courier identity, onboarding, eligibility, and work access.
dependencies.how: Controls who can accept courier work.

dependencies.name: Courier Availability & Incentives
dependencies.description: Availability, shifts, incentives, peak shaping, and supply planning.
dependencies.how: Shapes supply availability where demand needs coverage.

dependencies.name: Dispatch, Matching & Assignment
dependencies.description: Courier assignment and offer dispatch.
dependencies.how: Allocates delivery work to suitable couriers.

dependencies.name: Routing, Geospatial & ETA
dependencies.description: Routing, geospatial, and ETA calculation.
dependencies.how: Guides pickup and dropoff routes.

dependencies.name: Batching & Multi-Stop Optimization
dependencies.description: Batching and multi-stop delivery optimization.
dependencies.how: Improves courier utilization and marketplace efficiency.

dependencies.name: Courier Earnings & Payout Experience
dependencies.description: Earnings, tips, incentives, adjustments, and payout status.
dependencies.how: Makes courier pay understandable and timely.

dependencies.name: Courier Safety & Incident Response
dependencies.description: Safety controls, incident reporting, and response workflows.
dependencies.how: Protects couriers and coordinates safety issues.

rootGroups.name: Marketplace Foundations
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that control marketplace economics, trust, integrations, data, experimentation, and operations.

capabilities.name: Control Marketplace Economics and Risk
capabilities.description: Provide the identity, fraud, ledger, experimentation, data, and operations foundations needed to run a high-scale local delivery marketplace.

flows.title: Control trust, economics, and learning loops
flows.description: From account identity through pricing, settlement, experimentation, data, integrations, and operations control.

dependencies.name: Identity, Account & Access
dependencies.description: Consumer, merchant, courier, employee, and partner identity and access controls.
dependencies.how: Controls account access and actor identity.

dependencies.name: Fraud, Abuse & Policy Controls
dependencies.description: Fraud, abuse, risky payment, policy, and refund controls.
dependencies.how: Protects the marketplace from abuse while preserving fair flows.

dependencies.name: Pricing, Fees & Promotion Engine
dependencies.description: Marketplace fees, promotions, incentives, pricing, and margin controls.
dependencies.how: Balances conversion, affordability, incentives, and contribution margin.

dependencies.name: Ledger, Settlement & Tax
dependencies.description: Ledger, settlement, payouts, tax, adjustments, and reconciliation.
dependencies.how: Moves money correctly across consumers, merchants, couriers, and the platform.

dependencies.name: Experimentation & Growth Measurement
dependencies.description: Experimentation, incrementality, feature flags, and readout workflows.
dependencies.how: Lets teams learn which marketplace changes improve outcomes.

dependencies.name: Marketplace Data Platform
dependencies.description: Metric layer, feature platform, event streams, and analytics foundations.
dependencies.how: Provides trusted data for product, operations, risk, and finance.

dependencies.name: Partner APIs & Webhooks
dependencies.description: External partner APIs, webhooks, and integration surfaces.
dependencies.how: Connects marketplace workflows to partner systems.

dependencies.name: Marketplace Operations Console
dependencies.description: Operations controls, incident response, financial, support, and marketplace health workflows.
dependencies.how: Gives internal teams the controls needed to run the marketplace.
